creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Fabian. Reporters are welcome to self-request MFH to the quarterly branch by setting the merge-quarterly flag. 

Protip: It's very useful to be explicit/obvious, by adding a comment when doing so (Eg: "Quarterly port also affected", "Security fixes", "Bugfix only version update", etc)

Don't forget to confirm submitted changes pass QA (poudriere, portlint in particular) when/where possible.
